message.content:
@startuml
title Policy Authorization flow between Smart Edge Open and 5G core
header Intel Corporation
footer Proprietary and Confidential

skinparam backgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam noteStyle rectangle
skinparam actorStyle awesome

actor "User/Admin" as User

package "Smart Edge Open Controller Components" #lightblue {
    participant "CLI" as CLI
    participant "Af Microservice" as Af
}

package "5G Core Components" #lightgreen {
    participant "NEF" as NEF
    participant "NGC CP Function" as NGC
}

note right of NEF: Smart Edge Open provided\nCore component with\nlimited functionality

frame "Policy Authorization – Individual Application Session Context creation flow" {
    User -> CLI: Create application session\ncontext
    CLI -> Af: /af/v1/policy-authorization/app-sessions\nPOST
    Af -> NGC: /npcf-policyauthorization/v1/app-sessions\nPOST
    NGC --> Af: 201 Created: app-sessionId \\\nERROR
    Af --> CLI: 201 Created: app-sessionId \\\nERROR
    CLI --> User: Success: app-sessionId
}

@enduml
